seoDescription: Spring ISD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 29 last day, fall break, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Spring ISD starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 12, 2025 and ends on May 29, 2026. Fall Break runs October 13-17, Thanksgiving Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, Mid-Winter Break runs February 16-20, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. Spring ISD notes that Spring Early College Academy may experience calendar adjustments to accommodate Lone Star College class schedules.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Spring ISD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Tuesday, August 12, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring ISD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Spring ISD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 29, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Spring ISD have a Spanish calendar for 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Spring ISD publishes a Spanish version of the 2025-2026 instructional calendar, linked as an alternate calendar.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 12, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is May 29, 2026.
